## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Adventures Group and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, performance, and platform changes.](https://fathom.video/share/sbHtmggzkqHjqfxTi6sRf4Xas4Fnt1u5?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX transitioned from Aerox to a new Atlas-based platform, improving workflow efficiency and context management](https://fathom.video/share/sbHtmggzkqHjqfxTi6sRf4Xas4Fnt1u5?tab=summary&timestamp=91.0)
  - [Content performance remains stable, with Cancun showing strong growth (100k impressions/week)](https://fathom.video/share/sbHtmggzkqHjqfxTi6sRf4Xas4Fnt1u5?tab=summary&timestamp=763.0)
  - [New content opportunities identified: expat/snowbird-focused articles, local promotion guides for Puerto Vallarta](https://fathom.video/share/sbHtmggzkqHjqfxTi6sRf4Xas4Fnt1u5?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Tour-specific information needs refinement (all-inclusive terminology, transportation details)](https://fathom.video/share/sbHtmggzkqHjqfxTi6sRf4Xas4Fnt1u5?tab=summary&timestamp=388.0)

## Topics

### Platform Transition and Workflow Improvements

  - [Moved from Aerox to custom Atlas-based platform](https://fathom.video/share/sbHtmggzkqHjqfxTi6sRf4Xas4Fnt1u5?tab=summary&timestamp=91.0)
  - [New system allows saving of "context artifacts" (personas, guidelines, tour info)](https://fathom.video/share/sbHtmggzkqHjqfxTi6sRf4Xas4Fnt1u5?tab=summary&timestamp=138.0)
  - [Improved efficiency: no need to rewrite guidelines for each article](https://fathom.video/share/sbHtmggzkqHjqfxTi6sRf4Xas4Fnt1u5?tab=summary&timestamp=127.0)
  - [Temporary slowdown in content production during transition](https://fathom.video/share/sbHtmggzkqHjqfxTi6sRf4Xas4Fnt1u5?tab=summary&timestamp=104.0)

### Content Performance and Strategy

  - [Overall performance stable; 5% decrease in clicks but growing traffic](https://fathom.video/share/sbHtmggzkqHjqfxTi6sRf4Xas4Fnt1u5?tab=summary&timestamp=763.0)
  - [Cancun performing exceptionally well (100k impressions/week)](https://fathom.video/share/sbHtmggzkqHjqfxTi6sRf4Xas4Fnt1u5?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Focus on creating more detailed tour information to improve AI visibility](https://fathom.video/share/sbHtmggzkqHjqfxTi6sRf4Xas4Fnt1u5?tab=summary&timestamp=208.0)
  - [New content format: English and Spanish versions in same document](https://fathom.video/share/sbHtmggzkqHjqfxTi6sRf4Xas4Fnt1u5?tab=summary&timestamp=748.0)

### Tour Information Clarifications

  - [Cancun: All tours include pick-up service](https://fathom.video/share/sbHtmggzkqHjqfxTi6sRf4Xas4Fnt1u5?tab=summary&timestamp=696.0)
  - [Cabo: Transportation available for all tours, but often at additional cost](https://fathom.video/share/sbHtmggzkqHjqfxTi6sRf4Xas4Fnt1u5?tab=summary&timestamp=711.0)
  - ["All-inclusive" terminology:](https://fathom.video/share/sbHtmggzkqHjqfxTi6sRf4Xas4Fnt1u5?tab=summary&timestamp=427.0)
      - [Cancun: Can use for most catamaran tours, except Isla Mujeres](https://fathom.video/share/sbHtmggzkqHjqfxTi6sRf4Xas4Fnt1u5?tab=summary&timestamp=503.0)
      - [Cabo: Avoid using; specify included items instead](https://fathom.video/share/sbHtmggzkqHjqfxTi6sRf4Xas4Fnt1u5?tab=summary&timestamp=450.0)

### New Content Opportunities

  - [Puerto Vallarta:](https://fathom.video/share/sbHtmggzkqHjqfxTi6sRf4Xas4Fnt1u5?tab=summary&timestamp=804.0)
      - [Expat/snowbird-focused content (community info, events, trusted resources)](https://fathom.video/share/sbHtmggzkqHjqfxTi6sRf4Xas4Fnt1u5?tab=summary&timestamp=917.0)
      - [Guide on proving local residency for promotional rates (May/September)](https://fathom.video/share/sbHtmggzkqHjqfxTi6sRf4Xas4Fnt1u5?tab=summary&timestamp=1122.0)
  - [Cancun: Article on choosing the perfect boat tour, focusing on locations rather than vessel types](https://fathom.video/share/sbHtmggzkqHjqfxTi6sRf4Xas4Fnt1u5?tab=summary&timestamp=1382.0)

### Ongoing Content Development

  - [Puerto Vallarta: "Best areas to stay" article in progress, considering short-term vs. long-term visitors](https://fathom.video/share/sbHtmggzkqHjqfxTi6sRf4Xas4Fnt1u5?tab=summary&timestamp=804.0)
  - [Shopping in Puerto Vallarta: Expanded long-form article based on Isabel's input](https://fathom.video/share/sbHtmggzkqHjqfxTi6sRf4Xas4Fnt1u5?tab=summary&timestamp=856.0)
  - [Cabo: Review and refine tour descriptions, especially regarding transportation and inclusions](https://fathom.video/share/sbHtmggzkqHjqfxTi6sRf4Xas4Fnt1u5?tab=summary&timestamp=1050.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Isabel to review and finalize "Best areas to stay in Puerto Vallarta" article by Monday](https://fathom.video/share/sbHtmggzkqHjqfxTi6sRf4Xas4Fnt1u5?tab=summary&timestamp=804.0)
  - [Lorena to provide suggestions/edits for Cabo Adventures company overview](https://fathom.video/share/sbHtmggzkqHjqfxTi6sRf4Xas4Fnt1u5?tab=summary&timestamp=1036.0)
  - [Mariana to develop article idea around expat/snowbird information for Puerto Vallarta](https://fathom.video/share/sbHtmggzkqHjqfxTi6sRf4Xas4Fnt1u5?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Angie to provide detailed document on Cancun boat tour differences for article creation](https://fathom.video/share/sbHtmggzkqHjqfxTi6sRf4Xas4Fnt1u5?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
  - [Team to continue refining tour descriptions and "context artifacts" in the new platform](https://fathom.video/share/sbHtmggzkqHjqfxTi6sRf4Xas4Fnt1u5?tab=summary&timestamp=1069.0)
